generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor deployed in physical building to capture real-time occupancy data for DT monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor capturing real-time environmental conditions (temperature and humidity) for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring ambient light levels to support lighting control optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance PostOccupancySensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor network providing real-time feedback on environmental conditions, user presence, and system performance for BOREALIS"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PostOccupancyDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureHumiditySensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance PostOccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancySensorNetwork
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimEnrichedSemanticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based semantic model enriched with device metadata (tenant ID, endpoint addresses, control logic) bridging static design and dynamic operational data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoDittoConfigurator, UnrealEngine5Integration
]

instance RuntimeDataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime data model generated via model-to-model and model-to-text transformations from BIM for automated DT artifact deployment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoDittoConfigurator
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data stream ingested via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for visualization and analytics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Integration, BorealisReinforcementLearning
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time environmental metrics (temperature, humidity) streamed for building performance monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Integration, BorealisReinforcementLearning
]

instance LightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ambient light level data used for lighting control optimization and energy management"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Integration, TwinLightFramework
]

instance PostOccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Comprehensive real-time feedback on environmental conditions, user presence, and system performance from post-occupancy sensor networks"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PostOccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BorealisReinforcementLearning
]

instance ControlPolicyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Domain-specific control semantics (e.g., lighting control logic) embedded in BIM models for automated deployment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BimEnrichedSemanticModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TwinLightFramework
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MDE frameworks automating transformation of BIM models into deployable DT artifacts, reducing manual effort and ensuring consistency"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, AutomatedDeploymentService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight M2M service protocol enabling real-time data exchange between physical sensors/actuators and the DT"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, DataSynchronizationService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin framework for IoT providing standardized interfaces for device management and data synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataSynchronizationService, AutomatedDeploymentService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Integration : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Rich 3D visualization platform enabling immersive monitoring and simulation of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, InteractiveDiagnosticsService
]

instance BimTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools used by Building Control Engineers to model devices and define control logic as semantic backbone for DT deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework, AutomatedControlConfiguration
]

instance BorealisReinforcementLearning : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning framework enabling adaptive control policies that evolve over time based on real-time feedback"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveOptimizationService, AdaptiveControlService
]

instance HonoDittoConfigurator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware configurator extracting device metadata from BIM models to automate sensor integration and runtime interface generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataSynchronizationService, AutomatedDeploymentService
]

instance TwinLightFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM-centric control framework embedding domain-specific control semantics and automating deployment to physical systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedControlConfiguration, AdaptiveControlService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing continuous monitoring of building operations through real-time sensor data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingStateInsight, AnomalyDetectionInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service leveraging Unreal Engine 5 for immersive 3D visualization of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides InteractiveVisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service using reinforcement learning to dynamically optimize lighting systems for energy efficiency, visual comfort, and health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyEfficiencyRecommendation, ComfortOptimizationRecommendation
]

instance AutomatedControlConfiguration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service embedding domain-specific control semantics in BIM models and automating their deployment to physical systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlPolicyDeploymentAction
]

instance DataSynchronizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling continuous bidirectional communication between physical sensors/actuators and the DT"
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizationStatusInsight
]

instance AutomatedDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling automated deployment of DT artifacts based on BIM-enriched models"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentStatusInsight
]

instance InteractiveDiagnosticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling facility managers to interact with the DT for diagnostics and control through immersive interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:provides DiagnosticRecommendation
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing dynamic adjustments to physical systems based on real-time sensor feedback and evolving control policies"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveControlAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time overview of building operational state derived from sensor data streams"
]

    base:desc "Identification of operational anomalies or deviations from expected performance patterns"
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D representation of building operations enabling spatial analysis and diagnostics"
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable recommendations for energy consumption optimization based on predictive analytics"
]

instance ComfortOptimizationRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for improving visual comfort and non-visual health effects through adaptive lighting control"
]

instance ControlPolicyDeploymentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated deployment of control policies from BIM models to physical systems"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SynchronizationStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous assessment of data synchronization quality between physical and virtual twins"
]

instance DeploymentStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tracking and validation of automated deployment processes for DT artifacts"
]

instance DiagnosticRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable diagnostics derived from interactive exploration of the DT visualization"
]

instance AdaptiveControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of physical systems based on real-time feedback and evolving control policies"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control system actuator configured via TwinLight's BIM-centric framework for automated commissioning and bidirectional communication"
]

]

    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure serving as the system under study for digital twin implementation"
]

    base:desc "Centralized virtual representation of the entire building infrastructure integrating all subsystems"
]

    base:desc "Decentralized lighting subsystem twin operating independently while contributing to centralized DT"
]

    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance TemperatureHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance PostOccupancySensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
    base:isContainedIn LightingSubTwinEnvironment
]

instance HvacActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance WindowShadeActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance IoTGatewayController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance PlcController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:isContainedIn LightingSubTwinEnvironment
]

instance LightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:isContainedIn LightingSubTwinEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual world to the physical world are enabled through:
  - **Bidirectional control commands** generated by the DT and transmitted via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** to physical actuators (e.g., lighting systems, HVAC controls). These commands are derived from real-time analytics, optimization algorithms (e.g., reinforcement learning in **BOREALIS**), or user-defined control logic embedded in the BIM model.
  - **Automated commissioning** via **TwinLight’s framework**, which translates BIM-enriched control semantics into executable runtime configurations for physical devices. This ensures that virtual adjustments (e.g., energy-saving policies) are directly applied to the physical infrastructure.
  - **Service-oriented integration points** in the DT architecture, allowing custom services (e.g., predictive maintenance, adaptive control) to generate and dispatch actuation commands to the physical twin."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time to near-real-time**, with synchronization frequencies determined by:
  - **Sensor data acquisition rates** (e.g., environmental sensors may update every 1–5 seconds, while occupancy sensors may update less frequently).
  - **Control loop latency** (e.g., adaptive lighting systems in **BOREALIS** may adjust every few minutes based on reinforcement learning iterations).
  - **Middleware performance** (e.g., **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** supports millisecond-level latency for critical IoT communications).
  The DT is designed to maintain **continuous synchronization** with the physical twin, with the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** used to evaluate and ensure high fidelity between virtual and physical states."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  - **Central DT Framework**: Acts as the hub for bidirectional data exchange, integrating BIM models, runtime data, and user services.
  - **Middleware Layer (Hono/Ditto)**: Handles real-time communication between physical and virtual systems, ensuring seamless data synchronization.
  - **Visualization Layer (Unreal Engine 5)**: Provides immersive interfaces for facility managers to interact with the DT.
  - **Extension Points**: Standardized interfaces for integrating custom services (e.g., energy optimization, predictive maintenance) developed by **DT Engineers**.
  - **BIM Integration Layer**: Transforms static BIM models into dynamic DT artifacts via automated model transformations, ensuring semantic coherence between design and operation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the following lifecycle phases of its physical counterpart:
  - **Design phase**: Leverages **BIM models** as the foundational semantic representation, enriched with device metadata and control logic for initial deployment.
  - **Construction phase**: Supports clash detection, material tracking, and automated handover of operational data to the DT.
  - **Operational phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control (e.g., via **BOREALIS’s reinforcement learning**) throughout the building’s lifecycle.
  - **Refurbishment/Adaptation phase**: Facilitates dynamic updates to the DT by integrating new sensor/actuator data and evolving control policies without requiring a full redeployment. The DT’s modular architecture ensures compatibility with future upgrades."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies the alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart, validating the DT’s accuracy and responsiveness.
  - **Automated validation of BIM models**: Ensures that enriched BIM models (e.g., with device metadata) are syntactically and semantically correct before deployment.
  - **Real-time data synchronization**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** guarantees low-latency communication, minimizing discrepancies between virtual and physical states.
  - **Reinforcement learning feedback loops (BOREALIS)**: Continuously refine control policies based on real-time sensor data, reducing uncertainty and improving predictive accuracy.
  - **Modular architecture**: Allows isolated updates to services or components without disrupting the entire DT, ensuring incremental validation and evolution."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin (PT) and DT includes:
  - **Network protocols**: **Eclipse Hono** uses lightweight M2M protocols (e.g., MQTT, AMQP) for efficient IoT communication, while **Ditto** provides standardized digital twin interfaces.
  - **Middleware architecture**: A **service-oriented middleware layer** (Hono/Ditto) abstracts the heterogeneity of physical devices, enabling seamless integration of sensors/actuators with the DT.
  - **Endpoint addressing**: Device metadata (e.g., tenant ID, endpoint addresses) extracted from BIM models ensures that physical components are uniquely identified and accessible for bidirectional communication.
  - **Data normalization**: Sensor data is normalized and validated before ingestion into the DT to ensure consistency and interoperability."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed using:
  - **Cloud-native or edge computing**: The **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** framework supports scalable deployment, with components potentially distributed across cloud and edge environments for low-latency processing.
  - **Modular microservices**: The DT’s architecture allows individual services (e.g., visualization, optimization) to be deployed independently, enabling flexible scaling and updates.
  - **BIM-driven automation**: The deployment process is automated via **model-to-model and model-to-text transformations**, reducing manual intervention and ensuring reproducibility.
  - **Unreal Engine 5 integration**: For visualization, which can be hosted on dedicated rendering servers or integrated into facility management dashboards."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is achieved through:
  - **Standardized middleware interfaces (Hono/Ditto)**: Enable interoperability with external systems (e.g., ERP, CMMS, or other DTs) via open protocols (e.g., MQTT, AMQP).
  - **BIM as a semantic backbone**: Facilitates data exchange with other AECO tools (e.g., CAD, facility management software) by leveraging shared data schemas and metadata.
  - **Service-oriented architecture**: Allows the DT to expose APIs for integration with third-party systems, enabling seamless data flow across organizational boundaries."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards and frameworks:
  - **Building Information Modeling (BIM)**: As the semantic backbone for representing building geometry, topology, and component relationships.
  - **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**: For standardized IoT and digital twin interfaces, ensuring interoperability with other middleware solutions.
  - **Model-driven engineering (MDE)**: Principles for automating the transformation of BIM models into deployable DT artifacts, reducing manual effort and ensuring consistency.
  - **Industry-specific standards**: While not explicitly named, the framework is designed to align with AECO domain standards (e.g., IFC for BIM interoperability) and IoT protocols (e.g., MQTT, AMQP) for real-time communication."
]
